# checklist

> A fast, local-first checklist PWA that works offline with no account. Reusable templates, namespaces, markdown import/export, shareable links, and optional end-to-end-encrypted Google Drive or Dropbox sync.

## App

- [checklist](https://checklist.niclaslindstedt.se/): Create, check off, archive, reorder, and share checklists — entirely in the browser, no backend.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/niclaslindstedt/checklist#readme): Features, install, and configuration.
- [Source](https://github.com/niclaslindstedt/checklist): MIT-licensed TypeScript PWA built with React, Vite, and Tailwind.
